mapper.insert: insert into member_address(id, member_account_id, nickname, cellphone, provinces, city, district, is_default, detail_address, created_time, updated_time) values (#{longId}, #{longMemberAccountId}, #{strNickname}, #{strCellphone}, #{strProvinces}, #{strCity}, #{strDistrict}, #{intIsDefault}, #{strDetailAddress}, #{longCreateTime}, #{longUpdateTime})
mapper.update:
update member_address
nickname = #{strNickname},
cellphone = #{strCellphone},
provinces = #{strProvinces},
city = #{strCity},
district = #{strDistrict},
is_default = #{intIsDefault},
detail_address = #{strDetailAddress},
updated_time = #{longUpdateTime},
where id = #{longId} and member_account_id = #{longMemberAccountId}
